overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a desert outpost with shipping containers and modular buildings, then onto a highway passing industrial construction sites and rocky desert terrain. The footage features cinematic lighting, industrial architecture, and light vehicle traffic on asphalt roads.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a desert outpost with rocky cliffs visible in the distance. The vehicle navigates between shipping containers and modular prefab buildings on a narrow asphalt road. Red and white barriers indicate blocked paths ahead.

large colorful graffiti art painted on the retaining wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the outpost onto an open highway, revealing a distant city skyline. A concrete retaining wall with colorful graffiti runs along the right side while the road opens up. The rocky terrain shifts to the left as the vehicle accelerates.

segments.scene_description: Driving along the open highway following a blue sedan, with a massive industrial construction site dominating the right side. The landscape features desert rocks and sparse vegetation. Power lines run parallel to the road as the vehicle passes the unfinished highrise structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with guardrails and distant structures

events.description: overtaking a teal-colored sports car on the left side of the highway
navigating a gentle right curve in the highway

agents.ego_description: overtaking slower traffic and continuing along the winding desert highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle overtakes a teal sports car on the open desert highway, with metal guardrails lining the right side. Rocky outcrops dominate the left landscape while distant palm trees and road signs appear ahead. The road curves gently through the arid terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a cramped desert outpost into the expansive openness of a highway. It begins by navigating a narrow asphalt road flanked by shipping containers and modular prefab buildings, with red and white barriers marking blocked paths against a backdrop of distant rocky cliffs. As the vehicle exits the outpost, the confined industrial architecture gives way to a wide highway, revealing a distant city skyline on the horizon. The scene then opens further as the camera passes a concrete retaining wall adorned with colorful graffiti, while the rocky terrain shifts to the left as the vehicle accelerates into the open landscape.

The shot follows a continuous drive along an open desert highway that shifts from an industrial construction zone to a sweeping arid landscape. It begins by trailing a blue sedan, with the camera passing a massive, unfinished highrise structure and power lines that dominate the right side of the road. As the vehicle moves forward through the sparse vegetation and rocky terrain, the industrial architecture recedes and the road begins to curve gently. The scene then opens up as the camera overtakes a teal sports car, gliding past metal guardrails and rocky outcrops. Finally, the perspective extends toward the horizon where distant palm trees and road signs emerge against the vast desert expanse.
